The '''Temple of Pomojema''' on [[Mimban/Legends|Mimban]] was a shrine to the deity [[Pomojema]]. A large [[Ziggurat/Legends|ziggurat]] made of volcanic rock, it contained an enormous statue of Pomojema, imbedded in which was the [[Kaiburr crystal]]. The temple also had a deep sacrificial well within it.

==History==
In [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] came to the temple to retrieve the Kaiburr crystal. They were then [[Duel on Mimban|attacked]] by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], but managed to escape after Vader fell into the temple's well.

{{Loc-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Early concept art for ''[[Rogue One: A Star Wars Story]]'' used the Temple of Pomojema as a setting, before the [[Temple of the Kyber]] was developed to replace it.<ref name="ArtR1">''[[The Art of Rogue One: A Star Wars Story]]''</ref>
